response_constraints: Base the answer only on the targeted search result.
If the tool returns multiple candidate rows, report only rows at the requested location and order them alphabetically by name.
Do not imply that a full-record retrieval, profile lookup, availability check, list, mutation, cancellation, or notification occurred.

stages.purpose: Use targeted name-and-location search because the user lacks a stable ID; stop after the single read.

prompt: Which account is recorded under “Dover Toolworks” at South Region? I do not know its ID, so locate it by label and site. Return the one matching search result; do not fetch a full record, consult preferences, run a list, check availability, or make any persistent or messaging action. If the tool returns multiple candidate rows, report only rows at the requested location and order them alphabetically by name.
